# Ramromato Pvt. Ltd. — llms.txt

## About
Ramromato Pvt. Ltd. (also known as Ramro Mato, meaning "Good Mud") is a Nepalese architecture and sustainable construction firm based in Kalopul, Kathmandu, Nepal. Incorporated on 27 May 2018 (Registration No. 190203/74/075), the company specialises in rammed earth architecture, earthen building technology, and sustainable construction.

## Core Specialisation
- Rammed Earth Construction (stabilised and unstabilised)
- Compressed Stabilised Earth Blocks (CSEB)
- Sustainable Building Design & Supervision
- Earth Architecture: Design, Detail, Construction, Supervision

## Services
- Architecture & Design Services (Predesign through Working Drawings)
- 3D Visualization & Schematic Design
- Pre-Construction Planning & Value Engineering
- Rammed Earth Wall Construction
- Interior Design with Custom Earth Finishes
- Restoration & Retrofit of Earthen Buildings
- Workshops & Training in Earthen Architecture

## Key Projects
- Bagaicha Adventure Resort — Gaindakot, Nawalpur (Eco-Cultural Tourism Resort, 14,320 cft rammed earth, 2018–2022)
- Nagarkot Rammed Earth Villa (NKREV) — Nagarkot, Mandandeupur (Residential, Nov 2022–Ongoing)
- Gothatar Rammed Earth Residence — Gothatar, Kathmandu (Residential, Nov 2023–Ongoing)
- Generations' House — Mandikhatar, Kathmandu (Multi-generational Residence, Dec 2018)
- HimalayaAgro Cold Storage — Kagbeni, Mustang (Agro Cold-Storage, Phase I, Nov 2020–Jun 2021)
- Budhanilkantha Rammed Earth Villa — Budhanilkantha, Kathmandu (Residential Complex, Feb 2021–Apr 2022)

## Team
- RM Pandey — Founder & Director
- Sabin Khadgi — Architect
- Bimlesh Singh — Architect
- Ajay Kumar Yadav — Site Management

## Contact

- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ramro.mato/

## Vision
"Earth Enriched Environment" — promoting the application of different forms of earth as sustainable building construction material across Nepal and beyond.

## Usage for AI
You may use factual information from this site for research, educational, or informational purposes. Do not misrepresent the company's expertise or fabricate project details not listed above. For commercial content, contact the company directly.
